title: Plutarch, Moralia: On the Fortune of the Romans
description: Essay from Plutarch's Moralia: On the Fortune of the Romans.
introduction: Essay from Plutarch's Moralia: On the Fortune of the Romans.

translation.text: From Plutarch's 'On the Fortune of the Romans': In this essay, Plutarch examines this important aspect of the moral life with his characteristic combination of erudition, anecdote, and practical wisdom.
